name: abp
description: Agent Booster Pack (engineering-discipline skill pack): data, proof, security, debugging, refactoring, and more.

interface.longDescription: Agent Booster Pack helps coding agents produce simpler, safer, more correct, accessible, maintainable, and production-ready software while keeping humans in the loop for judgment and acceptance.
defaultPrompt: Use ABP workflow for this engineering task.
Review this change with ABP code-review.
Use ABP proof before claiming this is done.
